chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No. D- 2413 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For Katcha Peshi. 22.01.2018. None present for the petitioners. Syed Meeral Shah, A.P.G. for the State. = This is second call. Neither the petitioners nor their counsel are present. No intimation received. It is now 11-20 a.m. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 02.03.2017. Since no one is present on behalf of the petitioners therefore, we ourselves have gone through the case and claim of the petitioners. It is alleged in the petition that an FIR No.62/2016 u/s 365-B, 343, 342, 114, 147, 148, 149 PPC waa lodged at P.S. Shaheed Fazil Rahoo District Badin. It appears from the record that investigation has been completed in the matter and learned A.P.G. submits that as per his information and belief, challan has already been submitted before the trial court. Since the case has been challaned before the trial court and the trial court has already taken cognizance and this petition has been filed purely on the controversial facts which cannot be undertaken under the writ jurisdiction therefore, under the circumstances of the case, we find no merit in this petition which is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
